brand.name: Dynamic Wellness
brand.vertical: Health & Wellness / Network Marketing (Vital Health Global affiliate)
brand.tagline: Feel the Difference of Daily Vitality

offer.what: Vital Health Global wellness supplements (functional supplements across Awaken, Detox, Nourish, Restore, and Kids product families) plus an affiliate/business opportunity; sold via referral link under the Dynamic Wellness personal brand
offer.coreOutcome: Sustained daily energy, vitality, and balanced health through science-based natural supplements; secondary outcome: financial freedom and residual income for business-opportunity prospects
offer.pricePoint: Individual products $18–$100; Annual membership $29.99/yr (referral-only, unlocks member pricing); Vital Health Scanner $149–$300; bundles/packs available at discounted rates
offer.commitment: Annual membership renewal; product purchases can be one-time or recurring; no mandatory autoship found
leadMagnets: Membership invitation (referral-only access to member savings)
Vital Health Scanner demo or assessment

audience.icp: Health-conscious adults 25–50 (skewing female) seeking natural, science-backed energy and wellness supplements; often frustrated with synthetic supplements or persistent low energy, brain fog, or poor gut health
painPoints: Difficulty maintaining healthy weight or metabolism
Skepticism about supplement quality (synthetic vs. natural)
Desire for financial independence or a home-based business (business segment)
segments: Wellness consumers: buying for personal health outcomes, not interested in the business side
Affiliate/entrepreneur prospects: motivated by the income opportunity, use products themselves to validate before promoting
Existing members: already purchased membership, need activation and upsell to higher-value bundles or Scanner

salesCycle.length: Same-day to 1–2 weeks; product purchases are impulse-to-short-cycle; business opportunity recruitment takes weeks to months
salesCycle.trial: No free trial; referral-only membership ($29.99/yr) is the lowest barrier entry point; some affiliates may offer sample products informally
salesCycle.closeMechanism: Affiliate referral link direct to Vital Health Global store; personal 1-on-1 conversation or group presentation for business opportunity; checkout is self-serve once referred
salesCycle.topObjection: "Is this a pyramid scheme / MLM?" — skepticism about the business model; for product buyers: "Are these worth the price vs. drugstore alternatives?"

ahaMoment: First noticeable energy or health improvement after consistent product use (typically within 1–2 weeks of daily use) — the activation event that converts a skeptical trialer into a loyal repeat buyer and potential advocate

retention.recurring: Annual membership renewal ($29.99/yr); repeat product purchases once a product is part of daily routine; affiliate structure incentivizes ongoing purchasing to maintain commission eligibility
retention.expansion: Upgrading to higher-tier bundles (e.g., Elite Pack with Vital Scanner); recruiting new members to build a downline; advancing affiliate rank for higher commission tiers; adding products from other families (cross-family upsell)
retention.churnRisk: Slow or unnoticed product results in first 30 days; sticker shock on product prices without perceived differentiation; affiliate attrition if income expectations aren't met quickly; members who joined for the business opportunity but don't recruit

lifecycleGaps: Welcome & Onboarding — new members/buyers need a guided start (which products to take, how, what to expect in week 1–4)
Lead-Magnet Nurture — no public lead magnet found; prospects entering via referral link need education before they're ready to buy
Trial/Consult Conversion — business opportunity prospects need a follow-up sequence after a presentation or webinar
Booking & Reminders — opportunity calls, Scanner demos, and virtual events need confirmation + no-show recovery sequences
Value Newsletter — ongoing product education, success stories, and health tips to keep buyers engaged between purchases
Renewal & Expansion — annual membership renewal reminder + upsell to bundles, Scanner, or higher-tier packs
Win-Back / Re-Engagement — lapsed buyers or affiliates who went quiet after initial purchase
toneVoice: Warm, empowering, and aspirational — bridges science-backed credibility with personal transformation storytelling. Conversational but purposeful; avoids clinical jargon. Uses community language ('family,' 'journey,' 'legacy'). Inspirational without being preachy. Slightly more formal for business-opportunity messaging, more personal/relatable for wellness consumer messaging.
compliance: FTC disclosure required for income claims (affiliate/MLM context — must include income disclosure statement); FDA health-claim restrictions (cannot claim products treat, cure, or prevent disease); CAN-SPAM / CASL compliance for email; GDPR if sending to EU contacts. Avoid unsubstantiated health efficacy claims.
